Detailed Description

Output Conditioning Channel - Offset and Scaling
System ID: 0xD8 through 0xDF

+---------------------+------+-------------+--------------------+-------------+---------+------------------------+
| Register Name       | Id   | Type        | Unit               | Range       | Default | Comment                |
+=====================+======+=============+====================+=============+=========+========================+
|                     |      |             |                    |             |         |                        |
+---------------------+------+-------------+--------------------+-------------+---------+------------------------+
